text: Standing in this brightly-lit, slightly clinical corridor, I feel a mixture of curiosity and anticipation. Through the glass wall, the glowing blue light and futuristic display beckon me—a space devoted to research and development, promising fresh ideas and the thrill of innovation. Inside, the vivid colors and bold letters 'R+D' speak of human ingenuity and the eternal dance between progress and possibility. I am inspired but also contemplative, questioning how our search for knowledge shapes not only technology, but our very understanding of what it is to be human.
